hooks.command:
printf '
  ──────────────────────────────────────
            THE SESSION
            of today

     The terminal is open. The palette
      is selected. The cursor is, as
         it has always been, beige.

  ──────────────────────────────────────

'
echo '🎀 the session has concluded. it was, on the whole, fine.'
echo '🎀 [a small ceremony] something is leaving the collection. consider /commit-anderson before it goes.'
echo '🎀 [an asymmetric edit] history is being rewritten. the curator notes the time.'
echo '🎀 ✓ a small amendment, recorded in the title cards.'
